title: MLA 在 NPU 上：prefill/decode 拆分与权重吸收——torch_npu 融合算子最密集的一章
thesis: MLA（Multi-head Latent Attention）= 用低秩压缩把 KV cache 砍小（只缓存 kv_c 隐向量 + k_pe）+ 用「权重吸收」把 decode 期对 K/V 的显式解压省掉（把 q_nope 经 W_UK 投到 latent 空间，直接和缓存的 kv_c 做 MQA）。AscendMLAImpl 是 ch18 路由选出的 AscendMLABackend 的 impl_cls，它把通用 MLA（vLLM 的 MLACommonImpl/MLACommonMetadataBuilder）的 prefill/decode 两条路径，逐一换成昇腾最密集的 torch_npu 融合算子：npu_format_cast（权重排布）、npu_kv_rmsnorm_rope_cache（一把做 RMSNorm+RoPE+写 KV cache）、npu_fused_infer_attention_score(_v2)（注意力）、npu_attention_update（chunked-context 的 LSE 在线合并）。
source_reading_notes: 【纠偏 1：format 不是 29】process_weights_after_loading 对 kv_b_proj.weight 用 ACL_FORMAT_FRACTAL_ND 做 npu_format_cast；vllm_ascend/utils.py:L54 ACL_FORMAT_FRACTAL_ND = 2（ND 排布），不是 29。29 是 ACL_FORMAT_FRACTAL_NZ（vllm_ascend/utils.py:L55），它出现在两处：(a) 标准 absorb 路径末尾把 W_UK_T 经 maybe_trans_nz 转成 NZ（mla_v1.py:L988，maybe_trans_nz→npu_format_cast(weight, ACL_FORMAT_FRACTAL_NZ)）；(b) mlapo 融合权重 wd_qkv/wu_q 直接 npu_format_cast(..., 29)（mla_v1.py:L1030/L1051，已划入减法）。正文写 absorb 的权重 cast 时务必区分：kv_b_proj→FRACTAL_ND(2)，W_UK_T→FRACTAL_NZ(29)。

【纠偏 2：forward 不调 forward_mqa/forward_mha】在本版 AscendMLAImpl 里，forward_mqa 与 forward_mha 都只是 raise NotImplementedError（mla_v1.py:L1696-L1716，注释明说 'Use forward() instead'）。真正的 decode/prefill 分流发生在 forward() 内部：forward→_mla_preprocess→按 has_decode/has_prefill 分别调 mla_preprocess_decode（走权重吸收：_q_proj_and_k_up_proj，得 ql_nope）+_forward_decode 与 mla_preprocess_prefill（走 MHA 风格：显式 kv_b_proj 解压 k_nope/value）+_forward_prefill。'MQA 吸收 / MHA' 是 vLLM 基类 docstring 给的两种数学等价写法概念（mla_attention.py:L66-L118），不是本版的实际方法名。正文叙事按 forward 内的真实分流写。

decode '只缓存隐向量'：exec_kv_decode/exec_kv_prefill 用 npu_kv_rmsnorm_rope_cache 把未拆分的 kv_no_split（[B,N,1,kv_lora_rank+qk_rope_head_dim]）一把做 kv_a_layernorm 的 RMSNorm + RoPE(k_pe) + 写进分页 KV cache（cache_mode='PA'）。decode 路径返回 (k_pe, k_nope)，其中 k_nope 即缓存的隐向量 kv_c（latent），decode 注意力直接拿它当 K=V 做 MQA，不再解压成满维 K/V。
code_spine: vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L77-L115  AscendMLABackend.get_impl_cls/get_builder_cls — ch18 路由的落点：MLA→AscendMLAImpl + AscendMLAMetadataBuilder
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L427-L487  AscendMLAMetadataBuilder.build — 三段 metadata 总装配（split_decodes_and_prefills → build_prefill_metadata / build_decode_metadata）
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L489-L531  build_chunked_metadata — chunked-context 的分块切分（max_context_chunk / cu_seq_lens）
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L924-L960  process_weights_after_loading — 权重吸收的准备：npu_format_cast(ND).T → split W_UK/W_UV → W_UV.transpose / W_UK_T=W_UK.permute(1,2,0)
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L910-L922  _q_proj_and_k_up_proj — 运行期吸收：q_nope.transpose → torch.bmm(q_nope, W_UK_T) → ql_nope
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L900-L907  _v_up_proj — 用 W_UV 把注意力输出从 latent 投回 V（npu_transpose_batchmatmul）
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L1718-L1804  forward — 总入口：o_proj_input 预分配 → _mla_preprocess → 分别 _forward_decode/_forward_prefill 写入 → o_proj
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L1640-L1691  _mla_preprocess — fused_qkv_a_proj 拆 q_c/kv_no_split → 按 has_decode/has_prefill 分流
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L1620-L1638  mla_preprocess_decode — 吸收路径：_q_proj_and_k_up_proj + rope_single + exec_kv_decode
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L1598-L1618  mla_preprocess_prefill — MHA 路径：q_proj + exec_kv_prefill + kv_b_proj 解压 k_nope/value
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L1312-L1375  exec_kv_decode / exec_kv_prefill — npu_kv_rmsnorm_rope_cache 融合：RMSNorm+RoPE+写 KV cache
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L1136-L1241  _compute_prefill_context — 分块算历史 context + npu_attention_update 在线 softmax 合并 (LSE)
vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L1389-L1593  _forward_decode — npu_fused_infer_attention_score_v2（含 get_max_workspace 预取）走 MQA 吸收路径 + _v_up_proj

elide: enable_cp() 为 Context-Parallel 旁支（返回 AscendMlaCPImpl），精简版只走 return AscendMLAImpl 主线

embed_excerpts.code:
# Return `ql_nope`, `q_pe`
    def _q_proj_and_k_up_proj(self, x):
        q_nope, q_pe = (
            self.q_proj(x)[0]
            .view(-1, self.num_heads, self.qk_head_dim)
            .split([self.qk_nope_head_dim, self.qk_rope_head_dim], dim=-1)
        )

        # Convert from (B, N, P) to (N, B, P)
        q_nope = q_nope.transpose(0, 1)
        # Multiply (N, B, P) x (N, P, L) -> (N, B, L)
        ql_nope = torch.bmm(q_nope, self.W_UK_T)
        # Convert from (N, B, L) to (B, N, L)
        return ql_nope.transpose(0, 1), q_pe

def _v_up_proj(self, x):
        # Convert from (N, B, L)/(N, B, 1, L) to (N, B, L)
        x = x.view(self.num_heads, -1, self.kv_lora_rank)
        # Multiply (N, B, L) x (N, L, V) -> (B, N, V)
        x = torch_npu.npu_transpose_batchmatmul(x, self.W_UV, perm_y=(1, 0, 2))
        # Convert from (B, N, V) to (B, N * V)
        x = x.reshape(-1, self.num_heads * self.v_head_dim)
        return x

def process_weights_after_loading(self, act_dtype: torch.dtype):
        # NOTE: We currently do not support quant kv_b_proj.
        assert isinstance(self.kv_b_proj.quant_method, UnquantizedLinearMethod)
        # NOTE: Weight will be reshaped next, we need to revert and transpose it.
        kv_b_proj_weight = torch_npu.npu_format_cast(self.kv_b_proj.weight.data, ACL_FORMAT_FRACTAL_ND).T
        assert kv_b_proj_weight.shape == (
            self.kv_lora_rank,
            self.num_heads * (self.qk_nope_head_dim + self.v_head_dim),
        ), (
            f"{kv_b_proj_weight.shape=}, "
            f"{self.kv_lora_rank=}, "
            f"{self.num_heads=}, "
            f"{self.qk_nope_head_dim=}, "
            f"{self.v_head_dim=}"
        )
        kv_b_proj_weight = kv_b_proj_weight.view(
            self.kv_lora_rank,
            self.num_heads,
            self.qk_nope_head_dim + self.v_head_dim,
        )

        W_UK, W_UV = kv_b_proj_weight.split([self.qk_nope_head_dim, self.v_head_dim], dim=-1)

        # NOTE: When we make a incontiguous weight contiguous, a new address will be allocated for the weight,
        # in graph + RL scenario, we only capture the graph once, and the weight address is expected to be the same
        # across iterations, so we need to copy the weight to the original address after making it contiguous.
        if not hasattr(self, "W_UV"):
            # Convert from (L, N, V) to (N, L, V)
            self.W_UV = W_UV.transpose(0, 1).contiguous()
            # Convert from (L, N, P) to (N, P, L)
            self.W_UK_T = W_UK.permute(1, 2, 0).contiguous()
        else:
            self.W_UV.copy_(W_UV.transpose(0, 1).contiguous())
            self.W_UK_T.copy_(W_UK.permute(1, 2, 0).contiguous())
elide: else 分支（已有 W_UV 时 copy_ 回原地址）为 graph+RL 重捕获场景，精简版只走首次 if 分支建张量
enable_mlapo / fa_quant_layer 两条量化融合旁支（_process_weights_for_fused_*）整体划入减法；精简版只走 else 分支：W_UK_T 经 maybe_trans_nz 转 FRACTAL_NZ(29)

embed_excerpts.code:
def build(
        self,
        common_prefix_len: int,
        common_attn_metadata: AscendCommonAttentionMetadata,
        fast_build: bool = False,
    ) -> AscendMLAMetadata:
        num_reqs = common_attn_metadata.num_reqs
        query_start_loc = common_attn_metadata.query_start_loc
        query_start_loc_cpu = common_attn_metadata.query_start_loc_cpu

        self.num_decodes, self.num_prefills, self.num_decode_tokens, self.num_prefill_tokens = (
            split_decodes_and_prefills(common_attn_metadata, decode_threshold=self.decode_threshold)
        )
        self.set_num_actual_tokens(common_attn_metadata)
        assert self.num_decodes + self.num_prefills == num_reqs
        assert self.num_decode_tokens + self.num_prefill_tokens == common_attn_metadata.num_actual_tokens

        self.slot_mapping = common_attn_metadata.slot_mapping[: self.num_actual_tokens]

        query_seq_lens_cpu = query_start_loc_cpu[1:] - query_start_loc_cpu[:-1]
        self.query_lens = query_seq_lens_cpu[:num_reqs]
        if common_attn_metadata._seq_lens_cpu is not None:
            self.seq_lens = common_attn_metadata._seq_lens_cpu[:num_reqs]
        elif common_attn_metadata.seq_lens_cpu is not None:
            self.seq_lens = common_attn_metadata.seq_lens_cpu[:num_reqs]
        else:
            self.seq_lens = common_attn_metadata.seq_lens[:num_reqs].to("cpu")

        self.graph_pad_size = common_attn_metadata.graph_pad_size
        block_table_size = self.get_block_table_size(common_attn_metadata, BUILD_METADATA_STEP_PREFILL)
        self.block_table = common_attn_metadata.block_table_tensor[:block_table_size]

        prefill_metadata = None
        if self.num_prefills > 0:
            prefill_metadata = self.build_prefill_metadata(common_prefix_len, common_attn_metadata)

        decode_metadata = None
        if self.num_decodes > 0:
            decode_metadata = self.build_decode_metadata(common_prefix_len, common_attn_metadata)
        return self.metadata_cls(  # type: ignore
            num_actual_tokens_pcp_padded=self.num_actual_tokens,
            num_input_tokens=common_attn_metadata.num_input_tokens,
            num_actual_tokens=self.num_actual_tokens,
            query_lens=self.query_lens.tolist(),
            slot_mapping=self.slot_mapping,
            head_dim=self.model_config.get_head_size(),
            num_decodes=self.num_decodes,
            num_decode_tokens=self.num_decode_tokens,
            num_prefills=self.num_prefills,
            attn_mask=self.attn_mask_builder.get_splitfuse_attn_mask(),
            attn_state=common_attn_metadata.attn_state,
            prefill=prefill_metadata,
            decode=decode_metadata,
            query_start_loc=query_start_loc,
            block_tables=self.block_table,
            seq_lens=self.seq_lens,
            seq_lens_cpu=self.seq_lens,
        )
elide: _seq_lens_cpu/seq_lens_cpu/seq_lens 三路取 seq_lens 是为异步 spec-decode 兜底，精简版可只留一路并加注释；其余逐字保留以展示 num_decodes/num_prefills 双路装配骨架

embed_excerpts.code:
def build_chunked_metadata(
        self,
        common_prefix_len: int,
        common_attn_metadata: AscendCommonAttentionMetadata,
    ):
        if not self.chunked_prefill_enabled:
            return None
        num_reqs = common_attn_metadata.num_reqs

        num_computed_tokens_cpu = self.seq_lens - self.query_lens
        reqs_start = self.num_decodes  # prefill_start

        self.context_lens_cpu = num_computed_tokens_cpu[reqs_start:num_reqs]
        max_context_len_cpu = self.context_lens_cpu.max().item()
        if not max_context_len_cpu > 0:
            return None
        num_prefills_with_context_cpu = (self.context_lens_cpu > 0).sum().item()
        self.max_context_chunk = self.chunked_prefill_workspace_size // num_prefills_with_context_cpu
        self.max_context_chunk = round_down(self.max_context_chunk, self.block_size)

        assert self.max_context_chunk > 0
        self.num_chunks = cdiv(max_context_len_cpu, self.max_context_chunk)
        chunk_starts = (
            torch.arange(self.num_chunks, dtype=torch.int32).unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, self.num_prefills)
            * self.max_context_chunk
        )
        chunk_ends = torch.min(self.context_lens_cpu.unsqueeze(0), chunk_starts + self.max_context_chunk)
        self.chunk_seq_lens = (chunk_ends - chunk_starts).clamp(min=0)
        self.cu_seq_lens_cpu = torch.zeros(self.num_chunks, self.num_prefills + 1, dtype=torch.int32, pin_memory=True)
        torch.cumsum(self.chunk_seq_lens, dim=1, out=self.cu_seq_lens_cpu[:, 1:], dtype=torch.int32)
        chunk_actual_seq_lengths_kv_list = [
            torch.cumsum(self.chunk_seq_lens[i], dim=0).tolist() for i in range(self.num_chunks)
        ]
        return ChunkedContextMetadata(
            cu_seq_lens=self.cu_seq_lens_cpu.pin_memory().to(self.device, non_blocking=True),
            starts=chunk_starts.pin_memory().to(self.device, non_blocking=True),
            seq_tot=self.chunk_seq_lens.sum(dim=1).tolist(),
            max_seq_lens=self.chunk_seq_lens.max(dim=1).values.tolist(),
            chunk_seq_lens=self.chunk_seq_lens,
            chunk_seq_lens_npu=self.chunk_seq_lens.npu(),
            workspace=self.chunked_prefill_workspace,
            chunk_actual_seq_lengths_kv_list=chunk_actual_seq_lengths_kv_list,
        )
elide: pin_memory/non_blocking 的 H2D 拷贝细节可保留注释不展开；核心是 max_context_chunk = workspace_size // 带历史的prefill数 → round_down 到 block_size，num_chunks = cdiv(max_context_len, max_context_chunk)

embed_excerpts.code:
def build_prefill_metadata(
        self,
        common_prefix_len: int,
        common_attn_metadata: AscendCommonAttentionMetadata,
    ) -> AscendMLAPrefillMetadata:
        query_start_loc = common_attn_metadata.query_start_loc

        input_positions = common_attn_metadata.positions[: self.num_actual_tokens].long()

        chunked_context_metadata = self.build_chunked_metadata(common_prefix_len, common_attn_metadata)
        reqs_start = self.num_decodes  # prefill_start
        tokens_start = self.num_decode_tokens
        max_query_len = self.query_lens[reqs_start:].max().item()
        max_seq_lens = self.seq_lens[reqs_start:].max().item()
        prefill_query_start_loc = query_start_loc[reqs_start:] - query_start_loc[reqs_start]

        prefill_input_positions = input_positions[tokens_start:]
        cos, sin = get_cos_and_sin_mla(prefill_input_positions)
        prefill_query_lens = self.query_lens[reqs_start:].to(torch.int32)
        actual_seq_lengths_q = torch.cumsum(prefill_query_lens, dim=0).tolist()
        return AscendMLAPrefillMetadata(
            attn_mask=self.attn_mask_builder.get_splitfuse_attn_mask(),
            query_lens=prefill_query_lens,
            seq_lens=self.seq_lens,
            context_lens=self.seq_lens[reqs_start:],
            input_positions=prefill_input_positions,
            block_table=self.block_table[reqs_start:, ...],
            max_query_len=max_query_len,
            max_seq_lens=max_seq_lens,
            query_start_loc=prefill_query_start_loc,
            chunked_context=chunked_context_metadata,
            sin=sin,
            cos=cos,
            actual_seq_lengths_q=actual_seq_lengths_q,
        )
elide: reqs_start=num_decodes / tokens_start=num_decode_tokens 是把已重排 batch 的 prefill 段从 decode 段之后切出来；actual_seq_lengths_q=prefill_query_lens 的累积和（TND 变长右边界，回指 ch19）

def build_decode_metadata(
        self,
        common_prefix_len: int,
        common_attn_metadata: AscendCommonAttentionMetadata,
    ) -> AscendMLADecodeMetadata:
        num_reqs = common_attn_metadata.num_reqs
        query_start_loc_cpu = common_attn_metadata.query_start_loc_cpu

        input_positions = common_attn_metadata.positions[: self.num_actual_tokens].long()

        # Notice that num_decodes != num_decode_tokens in SpecDecoding Scenario
        actual_seq_lengths_q = query_start_loc_cpu[1 : self.num_decodes + 1].tolist()
        max_seq_lens = self.seq_lens[: self.num_decodes].max().item()
        self.seq_lens = self.seq_lens[: self.num_decodes]
        input_positions = input_positions[: self.num_decode_tokens]

embed_excerpts.code:
def forward(
        self,
        layer_name,
        hidden_states: torch.Tensor,  # query in unified attn
        kv_cache: tuple[torch.Tensor],
        attn_metadata: M,
        need_gather_q_kv: bool = False,
        output: torch.Tensor | None = None,
    ) -> torch.Tensor:
        assert output is not None, "Output tensor must be provided."
        if attn_metadata is None:
            # Profiling run.
            for layer in self.layer_sharding_kwargs or []:
                if is_hidden_layer(layer):
                    reach_layer_for_shard_weight_series(layer)
            return output.fill_(0)

        num_actual_tokens = self.get_num_actual_tokens(attn_metadata)
        num_decode_tokens = attn_metadata.num_decode_tokens
        # Inputs and outputs may be padded for CUDA graphs
        output_padded = output
        o_proj_input_shape = (_EXTRA_CTX.num_tokens, self.num_heads * self.v_head_dim)
        o_proj_input = torch.zeros(o_proj_input_shape, dtype=hidden_states.dtype, device=hidden_states.device)

        # MLA Preprocess
        decode_preprocess_res, prefill_preprocess_res = self._mla_preprocess(
            layer_name, hidden_states, kv_cache, attn_metadata, need_gather_q_kv
        )
        if decode_preprocess_res is not None:
            # MLA Preprocess for decoding
            output_decode = self._forward_decode(
                decode_preprocess_res.ql_nope,
                decode_preprocess_res.q_pe,
                decode_preprocess_res.k_nope,
                decode_preprocess_res.k_pe,
                kv_cache[0].shape[1],
                attn_metadata,
                decode_preprocess_res.dequant_scale_q_nope,
            )

            o_proj_input[:num_decode_tokens] = output_decode

        if prefill_preprocess_res is not None:
            output_prefill = self._forward_prefill(
                prefill_preprocess_res.q_nope,
                prefill_preprocess_res.q_pe,
                prefill_preprocess_res.k_nope,
                prefill_preprocess_res.k_pe,
                prefill_preprocess_res.value,
                kv_cache,
                attn_metadata,
            )

            o_proj_input[num_decode_tokens:num_actual_tokens] = output_prefill
        # O proj
        output[...] = self.o_proj(o_proj_input, is_prefill=prefill_preprocess_res is not None)[0]

        del o_proj_input
        return output_padded
elide: 原文 L1749-L1757 还有 (fa_quant_layer or enable_mlapo) and 纯decode 时走 DeviceOperator.mla_preprocess_only_decode 的快路，精简版只留 else: _mla_preprocess 主线
原文 o_proj 前的 weight_prefetch_method.maybe_prefetch_mla_or_sla_weight_in_current_stream 预取 + 末尾 is_kv_producer 的 maybe_save_kv_layer_to_connector 均为旁路优化，已划入减法（保留注释）

embed_excerpts.code:
def _mla_preprocess(self, layer_name, hidden_states, kv_cache, attn_metadata, need_gather_q_kv):
        # MLA Preprocess:
        # 1. Perform fused_qkv_a_proj and q_a_layernorm to obtain q_c and kv_no_split
        # or
        #    Perform kv_a_proj_with_mqa to obtain kv_no_split
        # 2. If need_gather_q_kv, perform all_gather.
        # 3. Preprocess decode tokens, write kv cache and get:
        # decode_ql_nope, decode_q_pe, decode_k_pe, decode_k_nope
        # 4. Preprocess prefill tokens, write kv cache and get:
        # prefill_q_nope, prefill_q_pe, prefill_k_nope, prefill_k_pe, prefill_value
        has_decode = attn_metadata.num_decodes > 0
        has_prefill = attn_metadata.num_prefills > 0
        if self.fused_qkv_a_proj is not None:
            qkv_lora = self.fused_qkv_a_proj(hidden_states)[0]
            q_c, kv_no_split = qkv_lora.split(
                [self.q_lora_rank, self.kv_lora_rank + self.qk_rope_head_dim],
                dim=-1,
            )
            q_c = self.q_a_layernorm(q_c)  # type: ignore[misc]
            # allgather need contiguous data
            kv_no_split = kv_no_split.contiguous()
        else:
            q_c = hidden_states
            kv_no_split = self.kv_a_proj_with_mqa(hidden_states)[0]  # type: ignore[misc]

        decode_preprocess_res = None
        prefill_preprocess_res = None
        # Preprocess for decode tokens
        if has_decode:
            decode_preprocess_res = self.mla_preprocess_decode(q_c, kv_no_split, kv_cache, attn_metadata)
        # Preprocess for prefill tokens
        if has_prefill:
            prefill_preprocess_res = self.mla_preprocess_prefill(q_c, kv_no_split, kv_cache, attn_metadata)
        return decode_preprocess_res, prefill_preprocess_res
elide: weight_prefetch / maybe_all_gather_and_maybe_unpad(Flash-Comm V1) / layer_sharding reach_layer / wait_for_kv_layer_from_connector / reshape_cache_event 等分布式与连接器旁路均划入减法；核心是 fused_qkv_a_proj 一把出 q_c+kv_no_split，再按 has_decode/has_prefill 双路分流

embed_excerpts.code:
def mla_preprocess_decode(self, q_c, kv_no_split, kv_cache, attn_metadata):
        num_decode_tokens = attn_metadata.num_decode_tokens
        decode_q_c = q_c[:num_decode_tokens]
        cos = attn_metadata.decode.cos
        sin = attn_metadata.decode.sin
        decode_ql_nope, decode_q_pe = self._q_proj_and_k_up_proj(decode_q_c)
        decode_q_pe = self.rope_single(decode_q_pe, cos, sin)
        dequant_scale_q_nope = None
        decode_slots = attn_metadata.slot_mapping[:num_decode_tokens:1]
        decode_kv_no_split = kv_no_split[:num_decode_tokens]
        decode_k_pe, decode_k_nope = self.exec_kv_decode(decode_kv_no_split, cos, sin, kv_cache, decode_slots)
        return DecodeMLAPreprocessResult(
            decode_ql_nope, decode_q_pe, decode_k_nope, decode_k_pe, dequant_scale_q_nope=dequant_scale_q_nope
        )
elide: 原文 L1628-L1632 的 fa_quant + A5 动态量化（npu_dynamic_quant）旁支划入减法；主线：_q_proj_and_k_up_proj 出已吸收的 ql_nope → rope_single 给 q_pe 加 RoPE → exec_kv_decode 写 KV cache 并返回缓存的隐向量 k_nope

embed_excerpts.code:
def mla_preprocess_prefill(self, q_c, kv_no_split, kv_cache, attn_metadata):
        num_decode_tokens = attn_metadata.num_decode_tokens
        num_actual_tokens = attn_metadata.num_actual_tokens
        prefill_kv_no_split = kv_no_split[num_decode_tokens:num_actual_tokens]
        prefill_q_c = q_c[num_decode_tokens:num_actual_tokens]
        prefill_q = self.q_proj(prefill_q_c)[0].view(-1, self.num_heads, self.qk_head_dim)
        prefill_q_pe = prefill_q[..., self.qk_nope_head_dim :]
        prefill_q_nope = prefill_q[..., : self.qk_nope_head_dim]
        cos = attn_metadata.prefill.cos
        sin = attn_metadata.prefill.sin
        prefill_slots = attn_metadata.slot_mapping[num_decode_tokens:num_actual_tokens]
        prefill_q_pe = self.rope_single(prefill_q_pe, cos, sin)
        prefill_k_pe, prefill_k_c_normed = self.exec_kv_prefill(prefill_kv_no_split, cos, sin, kv_cache, prefill_slots)
        prefill_k_nope, prefill_value = (
            self.kv_b_proj(prefill_k_c_normed)[0]
            .view(-1, self.num_heads, self.qk_nope_head_dim + self.v_head_dim)
            .split([self.qk_nope_head_dim, self.v_head_dim], dim=-1)
        )
        prefill_k_pe = prefill_k_pe.view(prefill_q_c.shape[0], self.num_kv_heads, -1)
        prefill_k_pe = prefill_k_pe.expand((*prefill_k_nope.shape[:-1], -1))
        return PrefillMLAPreprocessResult(prefill_q_nope, prefill_q_pe, prefill_k_nope, prefill_k_pe, prefill_value)
elide: 对照 decode：prefill 不吸收——q_proj 出满维 q_nope/q_pe，且 exec_kv_prefill 额外返回 k_c_normed，显式经 kv_b_proj 解压成 k_nope/value（MHA 风格，与基类 'compute-friendly' 写法对应）

embed_excerpts.code:
def exec_kv_decode(
        self,
        kv_no_split: torch.Tensor,
        cos: torch.Tensor,
        sin: torch.Tensor,
        kv_cache: tuple,
        slots: torch.Tensor,
    ):
        assert self.kv_a_layernorm is not None
        B = kv_no_split.shape[0]
        N = self.num_kv_heads
        S = 1
        # npu_kv_rmsnorm_rope_cache needs [B, N, S, D]
        kv_no_split = kv_no_split.view(B, N, S, self.kv_lora_rank + self.qk_rope_head_dim)
        cache_mode = "PA_NZ" if self.enable_kv_nz else "PA"
        c_kv_scale = None
        k_pe, k_nope, _, _ = torch_npu.npu_kv_rmsnorm_rope_cache(
            kv_no_split,
            self.kv_a_layernorm.weight,  # type: ignore[union-attr]
            cos,
            sin,
            slots.to(torch.int64),
            kv_cache[1],
            kv_cache[0],
            c_kv_scale=c_kv_scale,
            epsilon=self.kv_a_layernorm.variance_epsilon,  # type: ignore[union-attr]
            cache_mode=cache_mode,
        )
        return k_pe, k_nope
elide: A5+fa_quant 的 c_kv_scale=fak_descale_reciprocal 旁支划入减法（精简版 c_kv_scale=None）；enable_kv_nz 时 cache_mode='PA_NZ'，主线 'PA'。一把算子=kv_a_layernorm 的 RMSNorm + k_pe 的 RoPE + 写分页 KV cache（kv_cache[0]=k_nope/隐向量, kv_cache[1]=k_pe）

embed_excerpts.code:
_, _, k_pe, k_nope = torch_npu.npu_kv_rmsnorm_rope_cache(
            kv_no_split,
            self.kv_a_layernorm.weight,  # type: ignore[union-attr]
            cos,
            sin,
            slots.to(torch.int64),
            kv_cache[1],
            kv_cache[0],
            c_kv_scale=c_kv_scale,
            epsilon=self.kv_a_layernorm.variance_epsilon,  # type: ignore[union-attr]
            cache_mode=cache_mode,
            is_output_kv=True,
        )
        return k_pe, k_nope
elide: exec_kv_prefill 与 decode 同算子，差别：is_output_kv=True 且取算子第 3/4 个返回值（k_pe,k_nope=未量化的输出 KV，供 prefill 显式解压用）；decode 取第 1/2 个返回值（写进 cache 的隐向量）

embed_excerpts.code:
def _forward_prefill(
        self,
        q_nope: torch.Tensor,
        q_pe: torch.Tensor,
        k_nope: torch.Tensor,
        k_pe: torch.Tensor,
        value: torch.Tensor,
        kv_c_and_k_pe_cache: tuple[torch.Tensor],
        attn_metadata: AscendMLAMetadata,
    ) -> torch.Tensor:
        assert attn_metadata.prefill is not None
        num_tokens = q_nope.size(0)
        prefill_meta = attn_metadata.prefill

        actual_seq_lengths_q = prefill_meta.actual_seq_lengths_q
        actual_seq_lengths_kv = actual_seq_lengths_q.copy()

        attn_output = torch.empty(num_tokens, self.num_heads, self.v_head_dim, dtype=q_nope.dtype, device=q_nope.device)
        attn_lse = torch.empty(self.num_heads, num_tokens, dtype=torch.float32, device=q_nope.device)

        common_kwargs = {
            "num_heads": self.num_heads,
            "num_key_value_heads": self.num_heads,
            "input_layout": "TND",
            "atten_mask": prefill_meta.attn_mask,
            "sparse_mode": 3,
            "scale": self.scale,
            "antiquant_mode": 0,
            "antiquant_scale": None,
            "block_table": None,
            "block_size": 0,
            "softmax_lse_flag": True,
            "actual_seq_lengths": actual_seq_lengths_q,
            "actual_seq_lengths_kv": actual_seq_lengths_kv,
        }

        common_kwargs["query_rope"] = q_pe
        common_kwargs["key_rope"] = k_pe
        query, key = q_nope, k_nope

        attn_output, attn_lse = torch_npu.npu_fused_infer_attention_score(query, key, value, **common_kwargs)

        attn_output, attn_lse = self._compute_prefill_context(
            q_nope, q_pe, kv_c_and_k_pe_cache, self.qk_rope_head_dim, attn_metadata, attn_output, attn_lse
        )

        attn_output = attn_output.reshape([num_tokens, self.num_heads * self.v_head_dim])
        return attn_output
elide: L1261-L1269 的 dtype!=bf16 时统一 to(bfloat16) 再转回，及 L1290-L1296 的 head_padding>0 时 cat(q_nope,q_pe) 走非 query_rope 入参——均为非主线分支，精简版只留 query_rope/key_rope 解耦 RoPE 的主路；softmax_lse_flag=True 让算子额外吐 LSE 供 chunked-context 合并

embed_excerpts.code:
def _compute_prefill_context(
        self,
        q_nope, q_pe, kv_c_and_k_pe_cache, rope_dim, attn_metadata, prefix_output, prefix_lse,
    ):
        assert len(kv_c_and_k_pe_cache) > 1
        prefill_metadata = attn_metadata.prefill
        if prefill_metadata is None or prefill_metadata.chunked_context is None:
            return prefix_output, prefix_lse

        iters = len(prefill_metadata.chunked_context.seq_tot)
        cache_kv_c = kv_c_and_k_pe_cache[0]
        cache_k_pe = kv_c_and_k_pe_cache[1]
        num_heads = cache_k_pe.size(2)
        latent_kv_dim = kv_c_and_k_pe_cache[0].size(-1)
        actual_seq_lengths_q = prefill_metadata.actual_seq_lengths_q
        if iters == 0:
            return prefix_output, prefix_lse

        num_tokens = q_nope.size(0)
        D = self.v_head_dim
        H = self.num_heads

        if prefix_lse.dim() == 2:
            prefix_lse = prefix_lse.transpose(0, 1).unsqueeze(-1)
        prefix_output = prefix_output.to(torch.float32)
        prefix_lse = prefix_lse.to(torch.float32)
        out_list = [prefix_output.reshape(num_tokens * H, D)]
        lse_list = [prefix_lse.reshape(num_tokens * H)]

        common_kwargs = {
            "num_heads": self.num_heads,
            "num_key_value_heads": self.num_heads,
            "input_layout": "TND",
            "atten_mask": None,
            "sparse_mode": 0,
            "scale": self.scale,
            "antiquant_mode": 0,
            "antiquant_scale": None,
            "softmax_lse_flag": True,
            "actual_seq_lengths": actual_seq_lengths_q,
        }

        for i in range(iters):
            toks = prefill_metadata.chunked_context.seq_tot[i]
            context_seq_len_npu = self.get_context_seq_len_npu(i, attn_metadata)
            kv_c_normed = torch.empty(toks, num_heads, latent_kv_dim, dtype=cache_kv_c.dtype, device=cache_kv_c.device)
            k_pe = torch.empty(toks, num_heads, rope_dim, dtype=q_pe.dtype, device=q_pe.device)

            DeviceOperator.kv_cache_load(
                cache_kv_c, cache_k_pe, prefill_metadata.block_table, context_seq_len_npu,
                prefill_metadata.chunked_context.starts[i], key=kv_c_normed, value=k_pe,
            )
            kv_c_normed = kv_c_normed.squeeze()
            kv_nope = self.kv_b_proj(kv_c_normed)[0].view(-1, self.num_heads, self.qk_nope_head_dim + self.v_head_dim)
            k_nope, v = kv_nope.split([self.qk_nope_head_dim, self.v_head_dim], dim=-1)
            k_pe = k_pe.expand((*k_nope.shape[:-1], -1))

            actual_seq_lengths_kv = prefill_metadata.chunked_context.chunk_actual_seq_lengths_kv_list[i]
            common_kwargs["actual_seq_lengths_kv"] = actual_seq_lengths_kv

            common_kwargs["query_rope"] = q_pe
            common_kwargs["key_rope"] = k_pe
            query = q_nope
            key = k_nope

            chunk_out, chunk_lse = torch_npu.npu_fused_infer_attention_score(query, key, v, **common_kwargs)

            if chunk_lse.dim() == 2:
                chunk_lse = chunk_lse.transpose(0, 1).unsqueeze(-1)
            chunk_out = chunk_out.to(torch.float32)
            chunk_lse = chunk_lse.to(torch.float32)
            out_list.append(chunk_out.reshape(num_tokens * H, D))
            lse_list.append(chunk_lse.reshape(num_tokens * H))

        output_final, _ = torch_npu.npu_attention_update(tuple(lse_list), tuple(out_list), 0)
        return output_final.view(num_tokens, H, D), None
elide: _reorg_kvcache（CP 下重排，主线恒等返回）、fa_quant+A5 的 kv_c_normed 反量化（torch.mul fak_descale）、head_padding>0 的 cat 分支均划入减法。核心循环：逐 chunk 从分页 cache 读历史 kv_c→kv_b_proj 解压成 k_nope/v→对当前 query 算注意力(出 chunk_out,chunk_lse)→把 (新token的prefix) 与各历史 chunk 的 (out,lse) 拼进 lse_list/out_list→npu_attention_update 一把做在线 softmax 合并（等价基类 merge_attn_states）

embed_excerpts.code:
else:
            k_nope = k_nope.view(-1, self.num_kv_heads, block_size, self.kv_lora_rank)
            k_pe = k_pe.view(-1, self.num_kv_heads, block_size, self.qk_rope_head_dim)
        ...
        else:
            # The output layout is set to NBSD to eliminate the need for a
            # transpose operation after attention.
            # Input shape: [num_tokens, num_heads, seq_len, dim]
            input_layout = "BNSD_NBSD"
            q_nope = q_nope.view(num_tokens, self.num_heads, 1, -1).contiguous()
            q_pe = q_pe.view(num_tokens, self.num_heads, 1, -1)
            # Output shape: [num_heads, num_tokens, seq_len, dim]
            attn_output_shape = (self.num_heads_padded, num_tokens, 1, self.kv_lora_rank)
            sparse_mode = 0
            attn_mask = None

        common_kwargs = {
            "query_rope": q_pe,
            "key_rope": k_pe,
            "num_query_heads": self.num_heads_padded,
            "num_key_value_heads": self.num_kv_heads,
            "input_layout": input_layout,
            "atten_mask": attn_mask,
            "sparse_mode": sparse_mode,
            "softmax_scale": self.scale,
            "block_table": decode_meta.block_table,
            "block_size": block_size,
            "actual_seq_qlen": actual_seq_lengths,
            "actual_seq_kvlen": decode_meta.seq_lens_list,
        }
        ...
            attn_output, _ = torch_npu.npu_fused_infer_attention_score_v2(q_nope, k_nope, k_nope, **common_kwargs)

        if self.head_padding > 0:
            attn_output = attn_output[: self.num_heads]
        return self._v_up_proj(attn_output)
elide: _forward_decode 全长 L1389-L1593。删：fa_quant/enable_kv_nz 三种 k_nope/k_pe 排布 view（L1408-L1423）、SpecDecoding TND_NTD 与各 fa_quant/A5 的 input_layout 分支（L1428-L1500 多分支，精简版只留 else: BNSD_NBSD 主线）、图捕获 capturing 分支（L1534-L1587：get_max_workspace 预取 + graph_task_group + weak_ref_tensors）。保留：q_nope/q_pe/k_nope/k_pe 的 view、common_kwargs 装配、非捕获主线 npu_fused_infer_attention_score_v2(q_nope, k_nope, k_nope, ...)（注意 K=V=k_nope，即用缓存隐向量做 MQA）、head_padding 截断、_v_up_proj 把 latent 输出投回 V。注意算子第 2/3 入参同为 k_nope = 缓存的隐向量 kv_c（MLA 吸收后 decode 是对 latent 的 MQA）

embed_excerpts.code:
def rope_single(
        self,
        x: torch.Tensor,
        cos: torch.Tensor,
        sin: torch.Tensor,
    ) -> torch.Tensor:
        B, N, D = x.shape
        S = 1
        x = x.view(B, N, S, D)
        x = torch_npu.npu_interleave_rope(x, cos, sin)
        return x.view(B, N, D)

key_classes.name: AscendMLABackend
key_classes.responsibility: ch18 路由选出的 MLA 后端壳：get_impl_cls()→AscendMLAImpl、get_builder_cls()→AscendMLAMetadataBuilder、get_kv_cache_shape()=(num_blocks,block_size,num_kv_heads,head_size)、supported_kernel_block_sizes=[128]

key_classes.name: AscendMLAMetadataBuilder
key_classes.responsibility: 继承 vLLM MLACommonMetadataBuilder[AscendMLAMetadata]；build() 用 split_decodes_and_prefills 切 decode/prefill，派生 build_prefill_metadata / build_decode_metadata / build_chunked_metadata 三段；build_for_graph_capture 走图捕获

key_classes.name: AscendMLAImpl
key_classes.responsibility: 继承 MLAAttentionImpl；MLA 计算核心。process_weights_after_loading 做权重吸收；forward→_mla_preprocess 按 decode/prefill 分流→_forward_decode（MQA 吸收）/_forward_prefill（MHA）

key_classes.name: AscendMLAPrefillMetadata / AscendMLADecodeMetadata / ChunkedContextMetadata
key_classes.responsibility: 三个 dataclass：prefill 段带 chunked_context+cos/sin+attn_mask；decode 段带 block_table+seq_lens_list+cos/sin；ChunkedContextMetadata 装 cu_seq_lens/starts/seq_tot/workspace 等分块游标

key_classes.name: DecodeMLAPreprocessResult / PrefillMLAPreprocessResult
key_classes.responsibility: 两个 NamedTuple：decode 携 ql_nope(已吸收)/q_pe/k_nope/k_pe；prefill 携 q_nope/q_pe/k_nope/k_pe/value（多一个解压出的 value）

data_flow: 1. 加载期：AscendMLAImpl.process_weights_after_loading — kv_b_proj.weight 经 npu_format_cast(ACL_FORMAT_FRACTAL_ND=2).T → view(L,N,P+V) → split 成 W_UK(L,N,P)/W_UV(L,N,V) → W_UV=transpose(0,1)、W_UK_T=W_UK.permute(1,2,0)(N,P,L) → W_UK_T 经 maybe_trans_nz 转 FRACTAL_NZ(29)

2. 每步建元数据：AscendMLAMetadataBuilder.build — split_decodes_and_prefills 切 num_decodes/num_prefills → num_prefills>0 调 build_prefill_metadata（内含 build_chunked_metadata 切历史 context 分块）、num_decodes>0 调 build_decode_metadata → 装进 AscendMLAMetadata
3. forward 入口：预分配 o_proj_input(零) → _mla_preprocess
4. _mla_preprocess：fused_qkv_a_proj(hidden_states) 一把出 q_c+kv_no_split → q_a_layernorm(q_c) → 按 has_decode/has_prefill 双路

5a. decode 路：mla_preprocess_decode — _q_proj_and_k_up_proj(decode_q_c) 把 q_nope 经 torch.bmm(·, W_UK_T) 吸收成 ql_nope（latent 空间）→ rope_single 给 q_pe 加 RoPE → exec_kv_decode 用 npu_kv_rmsnorm_rope_cache 做 RMSNorm+RoPE+写 KV cache，返回缓存隐向量 k_nope/k_pe
5b. prefill 路：mla_preprocess_prefill — q_proj 出满维 q_nope/q_pe → exec_kv_prefill（同算子 is_output_kv=True）→ kv_b_proj(k_c_normed) 显式解压 k_nope/value

6a. _forward_decode：q_nope/k_nope view 成分页布局 → npu_fused_infer_attention_score_v2(q_nope, k_nope, k_nope)（K=V=隐向量，对 latent 做 MQA；图捕获路径先 get_max_workspace 预取）→ _v_up_proj 用 W_UV 把 latent 输出投回 V → 写 o_proj_input[:num_decode_tokens]

6b. _forward_prefill：npu_fused_infer_attention_score(TND) 算当前新 token 注意力（出 attn_output+LSE）→ _compute_prefill_context 逐 chunk 从 cache 读历史 kv_c→kv_b_proj 解压→算各块注意力(out,lse)→npu_attention_update 在线 softmax 合并 → 写 o_proj_input[num_decode_tokens:]

design_decisions.decision: 权重吸收 absorb：把 q 上投影与 K 上投影在加载期合并、decode 期用 torch.bmm 一次到 latent 空间
design_decisions.why: MLA 只在 KV cache 里存隐向量 kv_c（kv_lora_rank=512）+ k_pe（64），不存满维 K/V。若 decode 每步都用 kv_b_proj 把 kv_c 解压回满维 K/V 再算 MHA，既费算又费显存。吸收把 W_UK 预先 permute 成 W_UK_T(N,P,L)，运行期 ql_nope=bmm(q_nope, W_UK_T) 把 query 投到 latent 空间，于是 decode 直接对缓存的 kv_c 做 MQA（K=V=kv_c），免去解压 K，输出再经 W_UV 投回 V。
design_decisions.evidence: vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L910-L922 (_q_proj_and_k_up_proj), L924-L957 (process_weights_after_loading), L1589 (npu_fused_infer_attention_score_v2 三参同为 k_nope), L900-L907 (_v_up_proj)

design_decisions.decision: decode 走 MQA 吸收路径、prefill 走 MHA 解压路径（两条算子）
design_decisions.why: decode 每序列仅 1 个 query、KV 全在分页 cache 且很长 → 数据搬运受限，吸收成 MQA 最省（npu_fused_infer_attention_score_v2 吃 block_table 分页）；prefill 有变长 query 段、需 causal mask，计算受限，用 compute-friendly 的 MHA：显式 kv_b_proj 解压 k_nope/value 后 npu_fused_infer_attention_score(TND)。对应 vLLM 基类 docstring 的 'Data-Movement Friendly (forward_mqa)' vs 'Compute Friendly (forward_mha)'。

design_decisions.decision: exec_kv 用 npu_kv_rmsnorm_rope_cache 一把做 RMSNorm+RoPE+写 KV cache
design_decisions.why: 昇腾把 kv_a_layernorm 的 RMSNorm、k_pe 的 RoPE、写分页 KV cache 三步融合进单个 torch_npu 算子，省 kernel 启动与中间张量。decode 取算子前两个返回值（写进 cache 的隐向量），prefill 用 is_output_kv=True 取后两个返回值（未量化输出 KV 供显式解压）。

design_decisions.decision: chunked-context 用 npu_attention_update 做在线 softmax 合并
design_decisions.why: prefill 历史 context 可能很长，一次解压会爆显存；故按 max_context_chunk 分块逐块从 cache 读 kv_c→解压→算注意力(出 out+LSE)，再把当前新 token 的 prefix 与各块的 (out,LSE) 用 npu_attention_update 做在线 softmax 合并——等价基座的 merge_attn_states，回指 ch19 的 LSE/fused-infer 思路。
design_decisions.evidence: vllm_ascend/attention/mla_v1.py:L489-L531 (分块切分), L1189-L1241 (逐块循环 + npu_attention_update); vllm/.../mla_attention.py:L160-L175 (基类 merge_attn_states)

design_decisions.decision: kv_b_proj cast 用 FRACTAL_ND(2)，W_UK_T 才转 FRACTAL_NZ(29)
design_decisions.why: kv_b_proj.weight 先 npu_format_cast 到 ND（=2）以便 .T/view/split 这些 PyTorch 张量操作可用；真正喂给昇腾 cube 的 W_UK_T 才经 maybe_trans_nz 转 NZ（=29，FRACTAL_NZ，昇腾 cube 高效内排布）。两个 format 别混淆。
split_decodes_and_prefills 用 query_len ≤ decode_threshold 判定 decode；spec-decode 时一个 decode 步可验证多个草稿 token，故阈值放宽，但受 npu_fused_infer_attention_score TND 布局 16 的硬上限约束。

theory.topic: MLA 的低秩 KV 压缩与显存账
theory.detail: 标准 MHA 每 token 缓存 N×(P+V)（DSV3：128 头 ×(128+128)≈32768/token/层）。MLA 只缓存隐向量 kv_c（kv_lora_rank=512）+ 解耦位置 k_pe（qk_rope_head_dim=64），共 576/token/层——约 1/50 的 KV cache。代价：解码时要从 kv_c 经 W_UK/W_UV 解压回 K/V。'权重吸收' 把这个解压移到 query 侧、且和 K 上投影合并，于是解码完全不解压 KV，只对 576 维隐向量做 MQA。

theory.topic: 权重吸收的形状代数（可在精简版形状级验证）
theory.detail: kv_b_proj.weight: (N*(P+V), Lkv) →.T→ (Lkv, N*(P+V)) → view (Lkv,N,P+V) → split → W_UK(Lkv,N,P), W_UV(Lkv,N,V)。W_UK_T=W_UK.permute(1,2,0)=(N,P,Lkv)；W_UV→transpose(0,1)=(N,Lkv,V)。运行期 q_nope:(B,N,P)→transpose(0,1)=(N,B,P)；ql_nope=bmm((N,B,P),(N,P,Lkv))=(N,B,Lkv)→transpose=(B,N,Lkv)。decode 注意力 Q=ql_nope(latent)、K=V=kv_c(latent)，输出 (·,N,Lkv)→_v_up_proj：bmm 与 W_UV(N,Lkv,V) → (B,N,V)→reshape (B,N*V)。数学上等价 (q_nope@W_UK^T)·kv_c = q_nope·(W_UK^T·kv_c) = q_nope·k_nope，但把 W_UK 吸进 query 侧、避免对每个缓存 token 解压 K。

theory.topic: chunked-context 的在线 softmax 合并
theory.detail: 把长 context 切成 num_chunks=cdiv(max_context_len, max_context_chunk) 块，max_context_chunk=workspace_size//带历史的prefill数 后 round_down 到 block_size，保证每块 workspace 有界。逐块算注意力得 (out_i, lse_i)，与新 token 段的 (prefix_out, prefix_lse) 一起喂 npu_attention_update 做数值稳定的在线 softmax 合并：等价 out=Σ exp(lse_i-lse_max)·out_i / Σ exp(lse_i-lse_max)，lse_max=max_i lse_i。

theory.topic: TND 变长布局（回指 ch19）
theory.detail: prefill 用 input_layout='TND'：把 batch 内所有序列 token 沿轴 0 打平（T=Σ query_len），actual_seq_lengths_q=torch.cumsum(prefill_query_lens) 给各序列累积右边界，等价 cu_seqlens，让一个算子吃整批变长序列免 padding。decode 用 BNSD_NBSD + block_table 分页布局，吃 seq_lens_list 作 actual_seq_kvlen。

delete.what: 全部量化融合权重处理：_process_weights_for_fused_mlapo / _process_weights_for_fused_mlapo_a5 / _process_weights_for_fused_fa_quant（L994-L1115）及 process_weights_after_loading 内 enable_mlapo/fa_quant 分支（L962-L988 仅保留 else: maybe_trans_nz）
delete.why_safe: W8A8/MXFP8/FA-quant/mlapo 是性能与量化旁支，与 MLA absorb 主控制流正交；精简版假设非量化（与 process_weights 顶部 assert UnquantizedLinearMethod 一致），删后 bf16 主路完整

delete.what: Context-Parallel 旁支：get_impl_cls/get_builder_cls 的 enable_cp() 分支、_reorg_kvcache 的 CP 重排、AscendMLADecodeMetadata.cp_seq_len/dcp_mtp_attn_mask、import 的 mla_cp/common_cp
delete.why_safe: CP 是多卡长序列并行优化；_reorg_kvcache 在非 CP 下恒等返回 (kv_c_normed,k_pe)，删后单卡主路不变

delete.what: 图捕获/replay：update_graph_params（L785-L898）、_forward_decode 的 _EXTRA_CTX.capturing 分支（L1527-L1587，get_max_workspace 预取 + graph_task_group + weak_ref_tensors）、build_for_graph_capture、draft-graph 相关 import
delete.why_safe: ACL graph 是执行加速；精简版只验算子调用的可读控制流（非捕获主线 L1588-L1593），保留注释说明真实有图捕获节拍

delete.what: MTP/spec-decode 的 batch padding：pad_actual_seq_len_q_mtp_enable_pad/disable_pad（L354-L419）、build_decode_metadata 内 graph_pad_size>num_reqs 整段（L609-L647）、reorder_batch（L307-L352 可保留骨架或删）
delete.why_safe: fullgraph 等长 padding 与投机解码相关；非投机、非 fullgraph 主路下 graph_pad_size 不触发该分支

delete.what: _forward_decode / _forward_prefill / _compute_prefill_context / exec_kv_* 内的 fa_quant_layer、enable_kv_nz、A5(get_ascend_device_type)、head_padding>0 的多 layout/反量化分支
delete.why_safe: 都是设备型号/量化/非2幂头数的排布旁支；精简版固定 bf16 + 标准 PA + head_padding=0，只留每函数的 else 主线 layout（prefill TND query_rope/key_rope、decode BNSD_NBSD），控制流与算子调用序不变

delete.what: 分布式/连接器/预取旁路：_mla_preprocess 与 forward 内的 weight_prefetch_method.*、maybe_all_gather_and_maybe_unpad(Flash-Comm V1)、layer_sharding（register/reach/post_process_*）、wait_for/maybe_save_kv_layer_to_connector、reshape_cache_event、forward 内 DeviceOperator.mla_preprocess_only_decode 快路（L1749-L1757）
delete.why_safe: 都是 PD 分离/张量并行/KV-transfer 的旁路；单实例非分离推理下 need_gather_q_kv=False、layer_sharding 为空、kv_transfer_config=None，删后主路等价
本版二者不被调用（真实分流在 forward 内）；可保留为存根并加注释说明命名来自基类概念，或删去——不影响主控制流

delete.what: _forward_prefill 的 dtype!=bf16 时 to(bfloat16)/转回（L1261-L1269,L1306-L1308）
delete.why_safe: FIA TND 仅支持 bf16 的兼容转换；精简版输入即 bf16，删后形状级数值不变

must_keep.why: 权重吸收的准备入口，读者必须看到 kv_b_proj 如何被拆成 W_UK/W_UV
K 上投影权重，吸收的主角之一
V 上投影权重，_v_up_proj 用它把 latent 输出投回 V
permute(1,2,0) 后的 (N,P,L)，运行期 bmm 的右乘矩阵——吸收的关键中间物
运行期把 q_nope 吸收进 latent 的方法，核心招式
吸收的实际算子：ql_nope = bmm(q_nope, W_UK_T)
decode 注意力输出从 latent 投回 V，闭合吸收对称性
权重排布转换（FRACTAL_ND/NZ），昇腾特有
kv_b_proj cast 目标格式（=2），需与 NZ 区分
把 W_UK_T 转 FRACTAL_NZ(29) 喂 cube
三段 metadata 总装配入口
decode/prefill 分界，三段拆分的源头
prefill 段元数据装配
decode 段元数据装配
chunked-context 分块游标装配
三段元数据顶层容器
prefill 子结构（带 chunked_context/cos/sin）
decode 子结构（带 block_table/seq_lens_list/cos/sin）
继承 MLACommonMetadataBuilder 的 builder 类
MLA 计算核心类
ch18 路由落点，get_impl_cls 返回 AscendMLAImpl
承接 ch18 的 impl_cls 钩子
总入口，真实的 decode/prefill 分流处
fused_qkv_a_proj 拆分 + 双路分流
decode 吸收路径预处理
prefill MHA 路径预处理（显式 kv_b_proj 解压）
decode 写 KV cache 融合算子调用
prefill 写 KV + 输出 KV（is_output_kv=True）
RMSNorm+RoPE+写cache 三合一融合算子，本章最有代表性的昇腾算子
q_pe 加 RoPE（npu_interleave_rope）
prefill 注意力主路
prefill/chunked 注意力算子（TND）
chunked-context 逐块 + LSE 合并
在线 softmax 合并算子（等价 merge_attn_states）
decode 注意力主路（MQA 吸收）
decode 注意力算子，K=V=隐向量
prefill 与 chunked-context 里显式解压 k_nope/value 的投影
decode 预处理结果载体
prefill 预处理结果载体（多一个 value）

diagram_plan.name: roadmap-ch20
diagram_plan.spec: 复用 book/assets/roadmap/roadmap.py，高亮 Part V 注意力子系统：ch18(后端选择)→ch19(MHA)→【ch20 MLA(本章)】；上游回指 ch15(forward context 塞 attn_metadata)、ch16/17(KV cache 物理布局/slot_mapping)

diagram_plan.name: mla-absorb
diagram_plan.spec: 权重吸收图：左=标准 MHA decode（kv_c --W_UK--> k_nope, --W_UV--> v，再 MHA），右=吸收后（q_nope --W_UK_T(bmm)--> ql_nope 进 latent；与缓存 kv_c 做 MQA；输出 --W_UV--> V）。标注形状 (Lkv=512,P=128,V=128,N=128) + 'KV cache 只存 kv_c(512)+k_pe(64)'

diagram_plan.name: decode-vs-prefill-dispatch
diagram_plan.spec: forward 分流泳道图：hidden_states→fused_qkv_a_proj→(q_c,kv_no_split)→split_decodes_and_prefills→ [decode 道: _q_proj_and_k_up_proj(吸收)→exec_kv_decode(写cache)→_forward_decode(FIA_v2, MQA)→_v_up_proj] / [prefill 道: q_proj→exec_kv_prefill→kv_b_proj(解压)→_forward_prefill(FIA, TND)→_compute_prefill_context] →o_proj_input→o_proj

diagram_plan.name: chunked-context-lse-merge
diagram_plan.spec: chunked-context 在线合并图：长 context 切 num_chunks 块（max_context_chunk=workspace//prefills, round_down 到 block_size）；每块 read kv_c→kv_b_proj 解压→FIA 出 (out_i, lse_i)；prefix(新token) + chunk_0..n 的 (out,lse) 列表 → npu_attention_update → output_final。复用 ch19 的 LSE 在线 softmax 视觉语汇

diagram_plan.name: npu-kv-rmsnorm-rope-cache
diagram_plan.spec: 融合算子拆解：输入 kv_no_split[B,N,1,Lkv+R] + kv_a_layernorm.weight + cos/sin + slots + kv_cache(0/1) → 算子内部三步(RMSNorm on kv_c / RoPE on k_pe / 写分页cache) → decode 取(k_pe,k_nope=cache隐向量) vs prefill 取(is_output_kv 的 k_pe,k_nope)
